query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_provider_configs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  org_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  provider ENUM('OPENAI','AZURE_OPENAI','ANTHROPIC','CUSTOM_HTTP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPENAI',
  model VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gpt-4o',
  base_url VARCHAR(512),
  timeout_ms INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 30000,
  max_retries INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  temperature DECIMAL(3,2),
  azure_endpoint VARCHAR(512),
  azure_api_version VARCHAR(32),
  azure_deployment VARCHAR(128),
  custom_http_url VARCHAR(512),
  secret_ciphertext TEXT,
  secret_key_id VARCHAR(64),
  created_by VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_ai_provider_configs_org (org_id),
  KEY idx_ai_provider_configs_org_updated (org_id, updated_at)
);
